branches.condition: Developer chooses to verify an existing phone number instead of purchasing a virtual mobile number.
branches.effect_on_first_success: Allows sending messages without purchasing a number, but requires phone verification.
branches.path: Primary path with verified own phone number

branches.condition: Developer uses test API key and test credits instead of live key and balance top-up.
branches.effect_on_first_success: Allows sending messages only to verified own numbers for testing purposes.

candidate_paths.name: WhatsApp Business onboarding via MessageBird
candidate_paths.relationship_to_primary_path: Alternative onboarding path focused on WhatsApp Business channel setup rather than general messaging API.
candidate_paths.selection_basis: Official WhatsApp Business onboarding quickstart documented by MessageBird.

steps.action: Sign up for WhatsApp Business via MessageBird and submit application.
details: Provide Facebook Business ID or create Facebook Business account.
Submit application for WhatsApp Business approval.
steps.failure_or_wait: Waiting for Facebook and WhatsApp approval.
steps.input: Facebook Business ID and application data.
steps.success_signal: Application status visible in MessageBird Dashboard.

steps.action: Wait for Facebook Business verification and WhatsApp approval.
details: Accept WhatsApp invitation in Facebook Business settings.
steps.failure_or_wait: Verification pending or denied by Facebook.
steps.success_signal: Approval email from MessageBird Service Delivery team.

steps.action: Connect phone number for WhatsApp channel (use VMN or own number).
details: Select or purchase number for WhatsApp use.
Assign display name per Facebook guidelines.

steps.action: Activate WhatsApp channel by entering verification code sent via SMS or call.
steps.success_signal: Channel status changes from Pending to Active.

steps.action: Send WhatsApp messages using approved Message Templates via Conversations API.
details: Submit and get approval for Message Templates.
Use Conversations API to send messages.
steps.failure_or_wait: Template not approved or API errors.
steps.success_signal: Message delivery confirmed via API and Dashboard.

documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: Successfully send a message through the MessageBird API resulting in message delivery initiation.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: API response confirms message accepted; message appears in MessageBird Dashboard logs.
documented_first_success.official_milestone: Send your first message using the MessageBird API with a valid API key and a verified phone number or virtual mobile number.
documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: The documentation explicitly guides users to create an account, obtain API keys, purchase or verify a number, and then send a first message as the initial success milestone.

assumed_prior_state: Developer has internet access and a web browser
Developer can receive email for account verification
entry_point.developer_intent: Sign up for a MessageBird account and send a first message via the API.

friction_gates.description: Must create and verify a MessageBird account via email confirmation.
Must create an API access key in the Dashboard to authenticate API requests.
Must have test credits or top-up balance to send messages beyond own verified number.
Must have a verified phone number or purchase a virtual mobile number to send messages.
For WhatsApp Business onboarding, Facebook Business verification is required.
WhatsApp Business application approval by WhatsApp is required before channel activation.
WhatsApp channel activation requires entering a verification code sent to the phone number.

prerequisites.requirement: Create a free MessageBird account and verify email.
Generate an API access key (live or test) from the MessageBird Dashboard.
Have sufficient test credits or top-up balance to send messages to numbers other than your own.
Have a verified phone number or purchase a virtual mobile number from MessageBird.

primary_path.action: Sign up for a free MessageBird account and verify email.
details: Complete required fields on signup form.
Check inbox for confirmation email and confirm account.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Email not received or verification failed.
primary_path.input: User registration information and email confirmation.
primary_path.success_signal: Account active and accessible via Dashboard.

primary_path.action: Create an API access key in the MessageBird Dashboard.
details: Navigate to Developers section > API access tab.
Create new API key (live or test).
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Unable to create or view API key.
primary_path.input: Dashboard access and API key creation form.

primary_path.action: Purchase a virtual mobile number or verify an existing phone number.
details: Go to Numbers section in Dashboard.
Select country, capabilities (SMS, Voice), and number.
primary_path.output: Virtual mobile number assigned to account.

primary_path.action: Send a message using the MessageBird API with the API key and verified number.
details: Use official SDK or direct API call to send message.
Provide required parameters: originator, recipient, message body.
primary_path.input: API key, phone numbers, message content.
primary_path.success_signal: Message appears in Dashboard logs and API returns success.

sections_used: Claim free test credits & API Key
How to upgrade your MessageBird account
sources.title: MessageBird | Tutorials Getting Started

alternatives_considered.name: Bird CLI and SDKs
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: While Bird CLI and SDKs are official interfaces, the primary documented onboarding path starts with the Dashboard and REST API usage.

surface.name: REST API and Dashboard
surface.selection_basis: The official documentation and tutorials emphasize starting with the MessageBird Dashboard to create an account, generate API keys, and send messages via the REST API.

uncertainties.impact: Without this, time-to-first-success for WhatsApp onboarding cannot be precisely stated.
uncertainties.question: Is there an officially documented time estimate for the WhatsApp Business onboarding process?
uncertainties.reason_unresolved: The documentation provides detailed steps but does not specify expected duration.

uncertainties.impact: Could affect the definition of first success boundary and onboarding completeness.
uncertainties.question: Are there any additional mandatory configuration steps after sending the first message for general API usage?
uncertainties.reason_unresolved: Documentation focuses on first message send but does not explicitly state if further steps are required immediately.
